description: May finds herself in a disorienting, surreal spa scenario that repeatedly restarts whenever she questions its reality. She eventually discerns that something is wrong, realizes she is being manipulated, and tries to break out. Radcliffe and AIDA subdue her, sedating her for a new scenario.
location: Dr. Holden Radcliffe's house (New York / Radcliffe lab)

transcript.line: Hope you liked your facial, Melinda. It's time for your massage. Ready?
You dozed off. Obviously, you're very relaxed. That's good.
Yeah, I don't think I have time for this. Thanks.
Hope you liked your massage, Melinda. It's time for your facial.
Look, I-I don't think I want this. I don't want to be here.
Hope you liked your facial, Melinda.
The syringe, AIDA. You have to sedate her.
We may have misjudged what it takes to keep Agent May comfortable.
Heart rate normal, vitals stable. Seems to be working.
